title: Shri Hanuman Ji Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Hanuman Ji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Hanuman.
description:
Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki,
Dusht dalan Raghunath kala ki.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Jaake bal se girivar kaanpe,
Rog dosh jaake nikat na jhaanke.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Anjani putra maha baldayi,
Santan ke prabhu sada sahayi.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

De beera Raghunath pathaye,
Lanka jaari Siya sudhi laye.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Lanka so kot samudr-si khai,
Jaat Pavansut baar na layi.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Lanka jaari asur sanhare,
Siyaram ji ke kaaj sanware.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Lakshman murchhit pade sakare,
Aani sanjeevan praan ubare.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Paithi patal tori jam-kaare,
Ahiravan ki bhuja ukhare.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Baayein bhuja asur dal maare,
Daayein bhuja sant jan taare.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Sur nar muni jan aarti utaarein,
Jai jai jai Hanuman uchaarein.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Kanchan thaar kapoor lau chhayi,
Aarti karat Anjana mayi.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Jo Hanuman ji ki aarti gaave,
Basahin Baikunth param pad paave.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

Lank vidhvans kiye Raghurai,
Tulsidas swami kirti gayi.॥
॥ Aarti keejai Hanuman lala ki ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of performing Hanuman Ji's Aarti?
faq.a1: Performing the Aarti of Hanuman Ji helps devotees gain immense physical and mental strength, courage, and confidence. It is considered highly effective in warding off fear, evil influences, and various life obstacles.
faq.q2: What are the most auspicious days for worshipping Hanuman Ji?
faq.a2: While Hanuman Ji can be worshipped daily, Tuesdays and Saturdays are specifically dedicated to him. Performing his Aarti and reciting his prayers on these days is believed to be exceptionally fruitful.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are most pleasing to Hanuman Ji?
faq.a3: Hanuman Ji is very fond of Besan Laddus, Churma, Meetha Paan (sweet betel leaf), and Jaggery with roasted gram. Offering these as Prasad after the Aarti is the most traditional way to please him.
faq.q4: Can Hanuman Ji's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: You do not need to be in a temple to perform the Aarti. As long as the place is clean and pure, you can perform the Aarti with full devotion in front of an idol or picture of Hanuman Ji in your home temple.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti to receive Hanuman Ji's blessings?
faq.a5: Immediately after concluding the Aarti, reciting the 'Hanuman Chalisa' is considered the most powerful way to seal the prayers. It brings peace of mind and attracts the special grace and protection of Lord Hanuman.
